title: Ontop taps BVNK to add stablecoins to payrolls
message_html: Ontop taps BVNK to add stablecoins to payrolls ...
snippet: Ontop, the global workforce payments and payroll platform, today announced a strategic partnership with stablecoin infrastructure provider BVNK to launch embedded USD stablecoin accounts for international customers.

title: SlowMist introduces Web3 security stack for autonomous AI agents
message_html: SlowMist introduces Web3 security stack for autonomous AI agents ...
snippet: SlowMist introduced a layered security framework for Web3 AI agents as autonomous tools handle more onchain actions and digital assets.
